insight.executive_insight: The Cost of Acquisition (CoA) reached 18.8% as of March 1st, marking an increase from 17.5% on the preceding day. This indicates an upward day-on-day trend for the start of the month. A significant observation is the absence of data for March 2nd and 3rd, which currently prevents a complete Month-to-Date view and immediate trend analysis.

The MTD Revenue performance is actively monitored daily, providing granular insight into current sales trends. Day-on-day analysis allows for prompt identification of fluctuations and their impact on the overall month-to-date accumulation. This real-time visibility is crucial for early detection of deviations from targets and enables swift operational adjustments to optimize monthly revenue outcomes.
